news.title: OpenAI and chipmakers roll out MRC to prevent AI training slowdowns
news.description: OpenAI said it has partnered with chipmakers and cloud providers — including AMD, Broadcom, Intel, Microsoft, and Nvidia — to develop a new networking protocol aimed at improving the performance and reliability of large-scale AI training systems.
